name: @zakelfassi/htmlify
description_en: Turn agent answers into self-contained HTML artifacts and presentation decks — operator briefs, review packets, incident timelines, decision briefs, and talks. Zero dependencies, zero build, one file.
description_zh: 将代理答案转换为独立的 HTML 工件和演示文稿 — 操作简报、审查包、事件时间线、决策简报和演讲。零依赖，零构建，单个文件
